name: copilot-token-budget
description: Local credit tracker for GitHub Copilot CLI — AT&T Enterprise edition.

copilotBudget.monthlyAllowance.description: Monthly credit allowance. AT&T Enterprise promo: 7,000 cr/month until 2026-09-01. Overrides allowanceCredits from the pricing config when set.

copilotBudget.workspacePath.description: Workspace root path for instruction file scanning. Defaults to the first VS Code workspace folder.

copilotBudget.refreshIntervalSec.description: How often (in seconds) to refresh session data from disk.

copilotBudget.teamsWebhookUrl.description: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL for budget alerts (Phase 3).

copilotBudget.alertThresholdWarn.description: Credit usage percentage that triggers a WARNING alert (default: 60%).

copilotBudget.alertThresholdCrit.description: Credit usage percentage that triggers a CRITICAL alert (default: 90%).

copilotBudget.alertBinaryPath.description: Absolute path to the copilot-budget-alert binary (Phase 3). Leave empty to auto-detect.

copilotBudget.pricingPath.description: Absolute path to a pricing.json that overrides the bundled per-model rates, context windows, and allowance. Partial files merge over the bundled defaults; a missing or malformed file falls back to defaults.
